## Summary

- explain the change in plain language
- note the affected area or workflow

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run -s check` if code changes are included
- [ ] docs-only/manual review if this only changes documentation
- [ ] manual verification for the changed workflow, if applicable

## Privacy Review

- [ ] no secrets, tokens, or private local data are included
- [ ] no `runtime/` snapshot, `.env` content, or personal media is included

## Contributor Notes

- PRs should normally be opened from a feature branch, not from `main`
- documentation translations should update related language lists when needed

## Notes

- mention follow-up work, limitations, or rollout concerns if needed
